_comment: Hand-curated location/activity tags for Triumphs the manifest's presentation tree doesn't place (the residue from scripts/triumphs/build_index.ts). Keyed by recordHash. Each entry may set location (array of canonical world names from src/bungie/locations.ts CANONICAL_WORLDS) and/or activityType (a CANONICAL_ACTIVITY_TYPES name). Overrides win over every manifest-derived signal. Keys starting with _ are ignored.

0000000000.note: why this record was placed here by hand
